# `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE`

GitHub issue templates automatically populate the issue body when a contributor opens a new issue.

## Templates

| File | When to use |
| ---- | ----------- |
| `feature_request.md` | Propose a new feature or enhancement |
| `technical_debt.md` | Report code quality, maintainability, or performance debt |

## Adding a template

Create a new `.md` file in this directory. GitHub picks it up automatically.
Front-matter fields (`name`, `about`, `title`, `labels`) control how the template appears in the issue-creation UI.
